description_long: This information point is a modern exhibition booth designed for urban environments, featuring a sleek black platform with two prominent wooden counters. The counters display various electronic devices, likely tablets or phones, and are equipped with angled display stands for easy viewing. Behind the counters, there are two large vertical panels: one with a high-resolution image and branding for 'Rugged SA', and another with a product showcase and additional branding. The structure is open on three sides, inviting visitors to approach and interact with the displayed items. The materials used are primarily glossy black surfaces, wood, and printed signage, giving it a contemporary and professional appearance. The overall design emphasizes accessibility, product visibility, and brand presence.
description: A modern exhibition booth with black glossy flooring, wooden counters displaying electronics, and large branded signage panels. The open design and sleek materials highlight accessibility and product visibility.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing both wooden counters, electronic displays, and the main branded signage panels.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the back of the booth, with the solid black panels and the rear of the counters visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the solid black back panels and the closed-off nature of the booth from behind.
description_view_3: Front-right view focusing on the product display counter and the main signage, with a clear view of the open approach area.
attribute_facade_detailing: The facade features large, high-contrast printed graphics with bold branding and product imagery, set against smooth black and wood-textured surfaces. The counters have clean lines and minimal ornamentation, emphasizing a modern, professional look.
